behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files, class names (_SchemaFieldNormalizer, SaveSqlQueryRequest/Response, SqlLabResponse), variable names (needs_full_model, DEFAULT_DATASET_COLUMNS), and literal strings ('database_name', 'database', 'schema', 'schema_name').

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates exact variable name 'needs_full_model', exact condition 'if relationship_loads or needs_full_model', exact mixin class name '_SchemaFieldNormalizer', exact decorator 'model_serializer' with mode='wrap', and exact list entries to add—this prescribes the implementation rather than describing broken behavior.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific names like '_SchemaFieldNormalizer' class existence (test_schema_field_normalizer_exists), 'needs_full_model' variable (test_dao_handles_property_descriptors), and exact condition 'if relationship_loads or needs_full_model'—alternative correct fixes (different variable names, different mechanism like overriding dict()) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests only parse AST and regex-match file contents (e.g., test_dao_uses_needs_full_model_in_query checks 'if relationship_loads or needs_full_model' in content); no test imports modules or invokes list(), serializers, or endpoints.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test checks a distinct required element; a stub wouldn't satisfy the specific string/class-name assertions without actually adding them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three areas: DAO property handling, schema normalizer inheritance + populate_by_name, and DEFAULT_DATASET_COLUMNS entries.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section header comments (sql_lab/schemas.py, list_datasets.py, daos/base.py, pass-to-pass) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: No external structured data output beyond Pydantic schemas which are specified in instruction.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers match between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact file paths AND exact fix details (e.g., 'Introduce a boolean flag variable named needs_full_model', 'condition if relationship_loads or needs_full_model', add '"database_name"' and '"database"' to DEFAULT_DATASET_COLUMNS), removing any localization/design challenge.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
